name: Barbara Lea
abstract: Barbara Lea (April 10, 1929 – December 26, 2011) was an American jazz singer.

concerts.label: Friends of Alec Wilder Celebrating Wilder's Life and Music

about_quotes.speaker: Loren Schoenberg
about_quotes.evidence: The singer in his band was Barbara Lea. And we became friends.
about_quotes.doc_title: Loren Schoenberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer states: 'Yourself and George Wein and Barbara Lea, probably some of the few people left who knew him well.' The interviewee does not contradict this or claim a personal relationship with Barbara Lea, only acknowledging the group context.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hentoff Nat — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
